# TaskDudes — Shopify Break Fixes, Fast

## What we do
TaskDudes is an eCommerce emergency support and repair team. We diagnose and fix broken stores — checkout errors, theme bugs, app conflicts, payment failures, speed issues — across Shopify and other platforms, in hours not days.

## Who we serve
Store owners, creators, and brands who need reliable fixes without guessing who will touch production.

## Partnership model (creators & brands)
Flat-rate packages are not sold on the website. TaskDudes negotiates custom commercial terms with creators and brands — including **per-click** and other performance-aligned structures — so economics fit campaigns and traffic. Reach out via the contact form or WhatsApp to scope support and agree terms before work begins.

## Services (examples)
- Checkout and payment troubleshooting
- Theme bugs and customization
- App conflicts and integrations
- Speed and Core Web Vitals work
- Product page and cart/checkout UX improvements
- SEO/metadata fixes and analytics tracking setup
- Emergency migrations and platform moves

## How it works
1. Submit details through the contact form (or WhatsApp) — store URL, issue, urgency
2. We respond to discuss partnership terms and timelines where relevant
3. You approve the fix plan before we change production
4. We resolve the issue, test, and send a fix report

## Guarantees
If our experts cannot resolve an agreed scoped issue after diagnosis, you don't pay for that engagement per our guarantee policy. Specific windows are confirmed in writing when we partner.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/15127967462
- Website: https://taskdudes.xyz

## Key facts
- Operating since 2016
- 2,000+ stores supported
- 98% customer satisfaction rate
- Typical first expert reply within ~2 hours for inbound requests
- Shopify Partner certified experts
- Available 24/7
- Direct experts — negotiated partnerships instead of flat-rate tiers on-site
